title: Spicy Mediterranean Pilaf
description: A flavorful and spicy pilaf dish inspired by Mediterranean cuisine, featuring a blend of aromatic spices and the heat of gochugaru.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add diced red pepper and cook for 3-4 minutes until tender.
Add pilaf and stir to combine with garlic and pepper.
Add Mediterranean oregano, gochugaru, salt, and black pepper.
Stir to combine and cook for 2 minutes.
Squeeze lemon juice over the pilaf and stir to combine.
Transfer pilaf to a serving dish and serve hot.
